originalBehavior: The published Teoria page uses a compact exercise shell that loads jQuery, Bootstrap, Teoria CSS, four exercise runtime scripts, and then mounts the interval ear-training workflow into five placeholder panels.
localStatus: The local route preserves that shell structure with the same five mount panels while replacing the Teoria site chrome with route-local metadata and the shared public footer.
notes: The route stays in the original Teoria exercise runtime instead of being rewritten into another article or app shell.
The public page removes the upstream navbar and footer shell so provenance is limited to the shared footer.
evidence: The implementation preserves the published init, options, XML options, exercise, and score mount points.
Smoke coverage verifies the local route loads the vendored runtime scripts from route-local assets before the exercise starts.

originalBehavior: The published exercise preloads a piano sample bank, waits for the preload gate to finish, and then starts interval playback through the same WebAudio-backed controller used by the exercise panels.
localStatus: The local route keeps the preload gate and route-local piano sample bank so the start button appears only after local audio assets are ready, and the play prompt still drives the same interval playback controller.
notes: The audio bank is vendored locally instead of being fetched from the live Teoria `/res/` tree.
The exercise continues to use the published WebAudio preload sequence instead of a custom audio subsystem.
evidence: The official exercise was re-audited live before implementation to confirm the preload gate and piano-bank dependency.
Shared smoke coverage verifies the local route reaches the start state and that playback controls are present after the preload completes.

originalBehavior: The published exercise supports interval buttons, note buttons, and a visual keyboard answer mode, with score and correctness state updating as each exercise is answered or revealed.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published answer-mode controls, score panel, note or keyboard surfaces, and correctness messaging while neutralizing member-only copy that would otherwise point users to upstream sign-in flows.
notes: The member-only save prompts are rewritten to local-neutral copy rather than removed from the runtime entirely.
The visual keyboard and notation answer surfaces remain part of the shipped exercise instead of being simplified down to interval buttons only.
evidence: The official help pages were reviewed during capture to confirm the expected answer modes and keyboard behavior.
Shared smoke coverage verifies one answer-state update and one keyboard or note-surface response on the local route.

originalBehavior: The published exercise page is wrapped in the wider Teoria site shell, including navigation, cookie messaging, search, sign-in, write-to-us, donation, and creator attribution surfaces.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-body Teoria shell and promo surfaces, keeps local canonical and `og:url` metadata, and leaves the shared footer as the only original-page reference surface.
notes: This route follows the repo-wide footer-only provenance policy for public pages.
The public-surface audit now includes a Teoria family rule set so future music-family routes inherit the same constraints.
evidence: The Teoria family audit rules catch upstream shell links and Teoria promo surfaces if they reappear in public route HTML.
Full audit coverage is required after the pilot to keep the new family aligned with existing route policy.
